transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Uh hi doc, hi. Yeah. So yeah. I'm worried about some stuff with my hands.

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Well they're numb all the time. Well not all the time. A lot of the time. Mostly on the left hand but some on the right.

transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Is it just numbness or also pain?

transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: How long ago did this start?

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Probably a year or so, I don't know, a long time. I've ignored it mostly. But I dropped a boiling pot of pasta the other day and it freaked me out so I figured I should get help.

transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: Definitely a good idea to check in with us, I'm glad you came in. Have you noticed any other changes recently? Change in weight? Other numbness or tingling in other parts of your body? Anything out of the ordinary?

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: No, this is really it. Just my damn hands.

transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: Have you started or stopped any physical activity or other postural activity, like sitting more at the computer, spending time on your phone, etc?

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: I've been using my phone a bunch more, yeah. I'm doing well in online poker. I play it a lot now.

transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: I see. And you play on your phone?

transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: Can you show me how you hold it?

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Uh well I lay down a lot and just hold it over my chest.

result.information: Worried about numbness and pain in hands.

Numbness and some pain in hands, mostly on the left hand but some on the right. Started probably a year ago. Dropped a boiling pot of pasta recently due to numbness. Increased phone usage, playing online poker a lot, holding phone over chest while lying down.
